message:
fix(ci): gate Windows-dead test helpers with #[cfg(unix)]

Seven test functions/methods in tests/e2e_cli.rs are only called from
#[cfg(unix)] test functions, making them dead code on Windows where
clippy -D warnings fails.  Add #[cfg(unix)] to each.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
